title: erigeron pazensis
intro: Erigeron pazensis, also known as the Peruvian Fleabane or Paz's Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to South America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. The health benefits of Erigeron pazensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties for various health conditions.
